name: The Cesspit
short_description: The Cesspit is a first-person adventure horror game set in the sewers. You must explore the dark passageways and escape from the twisted inhabitants. You must find your way using candles and deal with the threats in the darkness.
detailed_description:
Introduction

The Cesspit is a first-person adventure horror game set in the deep, dark sewers.

You must explore the labyrinthine passageways where the twisted inhabitants of the sewers prowl and attempt to escape.
Relying only on the light of candles to guide your way, you must deal with the threats that loom in the darkness.

The Story

When the protagonist opens his eyes, he finds himself in an unfamiliar environment.
The claustrophobic, enclosed environment forces him to venture deeper in search of a way out, but the twisted inhabitants of the place are unwelcoming.

You'll have to explore the abandoned and ruined place and navigate through the obstacles that stand in your way of a way out.

Features

  • Areas are dark and complex.
  • Scary sights and sounds are present.
  • In order to proceed to the next area, a prerequisite is required.
  • The sewers are home to several inhabitants, none of whom are friendly.
  • Deal with creatures with different characteristics.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Korean
